zh.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Merton II是Ranulphus de Merton I和Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton I的兒子，出生。他和Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II至少有1個兒子。他去世在英國英格蘭爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Merton II是Ranulphus de Merton I和Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton I的儿子，出生。他和Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II至少有1个儿子。他去世在英国英格兰爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Merton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called Merton, such as found in Surrey, Kent, Devon, Oxfordshire, and Norfolk. The placename derives from Old English mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with both Marton and Murton .

variants.name: Marton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Antal, Arpad, Geza, Andras, Bela, Denes, Endre, Gaza, Imre, Istvan, Janos.

English: habitational name from any of several places so called, principally in Lincolnshire, Warwickshire, and North Yorkshire, named in Old English as ‘settlement by a lake’ (from mere or mær ‘pool, lake’ + tūn ‘settlement’) or as ‘settlement by a boundary’ (from (ge)mære ‘boundary’ + tūn ‘settlement’). Compare Martin 2.
Hungarian (Márton): from the personal name Márton (see Martin 1). This surname is also found in Romania; see also 3 below.

en.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Merton II was born as the son of Ranulphus de Merton I and Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton I. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. He died in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Merton II est né, fils de Ranulphus de Merton I et Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton I. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. Il est décédé à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Merton II wurde, als Sohn von Ranulphus de Merton I und Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton I geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Merton II è nato il come figlio di Ranulphus de Merton I e Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton I. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. Morì nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Merton, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Merton IIはRanulphus de Merton IとMrs. Ranulphus de Merton Iの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs. Ranulphus de Merton IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼はイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Merton II(은)는 Ranulphus de Merton I(와)과 Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton I의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Merton II nasceu filho de Ranulphus de Merton I e Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton I. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. Ele faleceu em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Merton II родился. Его родителей звали Ranulphus de Merton I и Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton I. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. Он умер в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Merton II nació como hijo de Ranulphus de Merton I y Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton I. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. Murió en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
